hadith_entries.text:
152. Narrated Abu-Musa Al-Asha'ari: 'The Prophet
said: "Intercede that you would be rewarded and Allah
decrees whatever He wills on His Prophet's tongue."
You have released me. By Allah, the freed slaves would rule over
the Arabs that the preachers pray unto Allah for them on the
pulpits. Al-Zohri said: 'O commander of the faithful! It is the
religion of Allah that raises those who guard it and lower those
who abandon it.'"*
Riyadhos-Saliheen (The Meadows of the Righteous)
